overview.description: The iShares Enhanced Short-Term Bond Active ETF (CSHP) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in investment grade fixed income. The fund is actively managed, seeking total returns by globally investing in investment-grade, short-term fixed-income securities. CSHP was launched on Jul 17, 2024 and is issued by BlackRock.
infoTable: ICE BofAML 3-Month U.S. Treasury Bill Index
